Hi everyone, Brandon Dostin here and welcome to the 10x Business Buying Accelerator. Over the course of the next 28 days, I'm going to show you how to acquire your own cash flowing business with little to no money down. This training is for people who want to 10x their life, starting today through the power of acquiring, scaling, and eventually exiting a business. Over the course of the next 28 days, I'm going to systematically teach you how to own a profitable business that could potentially generate a six-figure income for you, even while you sleep. Acquiring a cash flowing business can allow you to live your life on your own terms and your own hours. You can also replace a low-impact 9-5 job you dislike, making you your own boss, and help you reclaim your personal time. Yes, it will take hard work. There's no question. This isn't a magical formula where you get something for nothing. You'll need to hone in your skills. You'll need to put your back into this. But it's possible. I believe that most people seeking businesses to purchase are doing so either because they don't want a traditional job and all the trappings that go with it, or because they're trying to grow their personal wealth through a business and have unlimited earning potential. If you've come this far, my guess is you don't want limitations on your income. You don't want a boss or a constraint on your personal time. You don't want people telling you what to do. It is possible to unleash your income potential, to be your own boss, and take total control of your time. Here's how I'm going to help you get there over the next 28 days. First, we're going to start with some pre-work on your mindset and your expectations, and the main reason why you want to acquire a cash flowing business. This is an important foundation for you to build before you can do the work of finding, acquiring, growing, and scaling a business. We'll consider this pre-work for the next 28 days, your personal program. You'll also find a syllabus in this section with a suggested breakdown of how you approach this material. Each week we'll consist of three components. The core curriculum, bonus resources to help you make the most of the curriculum and take action, and a recorded unplugged session where I've taken questions about the core material. During the first three weeks of this program, we'll focus on finding and attracting quality deal flow. In week one of the program, we'll focus on the basics of deal types, which deal types I've most commonly seen and which I personally prefer. I'll show you an amazing 10x resource grant cardon and I have made just for acquisition entrepreneurs like you. We'll also cover how to map out your perfect business acquisition criteria. Build what I call your deal team. Start identifying acquisition leads, narrow those leads down, and begin meeting with business owners. In the second week, you'll learn about vetting the businesses you've met with and starting to negotiate the deal. We'll also discuss sending your letters of intent and eventually an offer letter. Week three, we'll cover financing the business. We'll cover lots of creative ways to finance deals ranging from little to no money out of your pocket to earning into the business as an intrapreneur and buying distressed businesses. You'll see how the government makes it possible for acquisition entrepreneurs to get access to money to buy the business of your dreams. And how to get those financed years to agree to lend you money. And how to logistically complete the financing process. Section two of the course continues during week four. We'll cover final negotiations, final stage due diligence, and closing the deal. In the final section of this course, we'll discuss life as a 10X business owner and what your challenges and roadmap will look like. After the 28 days, there is a bonus section with interviews with 10X acquisition entrepreneurs who will share their personal story, experts in deal making skills, and I share some of my own war stories. All of those bonuses give you a real world application of the material we'll be covering. I'd recommend going through the material more than once. Once as an introduction where you can take notes and complete the resource section. And second, the second time is where you'll actually try to execute the blueprint. I suggest going through the course according to the syllabus we've included in the course outline to complete the course within 28 days. You'll need to commit to doing around two or three lessons per day. If you do it twice, that basically is a two month roadmap from going from zero to an acquisition entrepreneur. I'm excited for you.
